Fix crawler pipeline: remove broken partition filter and fix Flyway version

- Remove partition-based URL filtering from CrawlScheduler that silently
  dropped URLs dequeued by the wrong downloader instance
- Remove incompatible flyway-database-postgresql:10.8.1 dependency that
  crashed url-seen (AbstractMethodError with flyway-core 9.x)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ping_agent: remove status updates, delegate to auth_agent

Ping agent now only records metrics and updates last_ping_at.
Status (online/offline) is managed exclusively by auth_agent.

Fix Gradle SIGSEGV crash in Docker builds on ARM (Apple Silicon)

Switch build stage from eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-alpine to eclipse-temurin:21-jdk
to avoid musl libc native library crash, and add --no-watch-fs flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Simplify connection path in architecture diagram

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update architecture diagram via draw.io desktop editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(sprint-4): payments, planning, dashboard + review fixes

Sprint 4 — nouvelles fonctionnalités :
- Modèle Payment (Prisma) + migration add-payments
- API paiements : /api/orders/[id]/payments, /api/payments, /api/payments/[id]/receipt
- API facture PDF : /api/orders/[id]/invoice
- API stats dashboard : /api/dashboard/stats (param period)
- Composants : PaymentSummary, PaymentForm, PaymentHistory
- Pages : /dashboard/payments, /dashboard/calendar
- Dashboard : KPIs réels, commandes récentes, échéances 7j

Revue complète sprints 1-4 — corrections :
- fix(monetary): totalPaid stocké en FCFA (cohérent avec totalPrice), conversion centimes→FCFA lors agrégation
- fix(orders): auto-création Payment(ADVANCE) à la création commande si avance > 0
- fix(dashboard): skeleton loaders remplacent les tirets, filtre période CA
- fix(order-form): Select shadcn pour type vêtement, recherche client, reste à payer dynamique
- fix(client-form): centrage mx-auto
- fix(measurements): champs libres par client (ajout/suppression sans contrainte de template)
- fix(navigation): lien Mesures dans sidebar
- fix(planning): description du principe ajoutée
- fix(neon): connect_timeout=15 dans DATABASE_URL pour éviter P1001

Fix Tailscale proxy DNS for multi-service apps, fix self-update permissions

Tailscale sidecar ts-serve.json now uses the actual Docker Compose service
name for DNS resolution instead of assuming myground-{id}. Fixes 502 Bad
Gateway for Immich and other multi-service apps over tailnet.

Self-update no longer backs up the old binary. Falls back to sudo cp when
the install directory is root-owned.

commit.message:
Document Condition as first-class value type in docs and spec

The Condition type already works as a first-class value (type annotations,
variables, function parameters, apply_condition), but was underdocumented.

- ai_authoring.md: Add Condition to type quick-reference table, add
  "Condition as First-Class Value" pattern with shared helper example
- language_reference.md: Expand Condition type description, add usage
  examples showing variables and function parameters
- spec/v0/01_type_system.ttrpg: Add Condition type section documenting
  semantics, usage patterns, and Condition vs ActiveCondition distinction

Closes tdsl-u8fa

commit.message:
feat: virtualized log list + cross-node search pagination

Add @tanstack/react-virtual for windowed DOM rendering of log entries
(VirtualLogList). Fix cross-node pagination: the coordinator now carries
opaque per-vault resume tokens from remote nodes so that infinite scroll
works when the coordinator has no local vaults. The remote search
executor (executors.go) was ignoring the resume token entirely — now it
properly resumes and reports hasMore.

Closes gastrolog-5a5r

automatically cleaned up on each run.

commit.message:
feat: add local file upload for document decomposer

Allow users to upload .md files from their local machine for analysis,
instead of being limited to the fixed server-side project-docs directory.
Uploaded file content is stored in SQLite database to survive ephemeral
filesystem resets on Railway. Includes upload/delete API endpoints,
combined document listing, and file picker UI with visual distinction
between server-side and uploaded documents.

commit.message:
Fix session_count regression: read from snapshot instead of live identity

The daemon continuously overwrites identity.json, clobbering the
session_count that raising sessions save after each run. This caused
all sessions to repeat as session 3 (~24 runs lost to the same
session number). Read session_count from snapshots/identity.json
(written only by the raising script) as the daemon-proof source of
truth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: define copier.yaml metadata schema for template modules (#3)

* feat: land GitWeave foundation specs and control repo structure

This commit implements the foundation specifications for GitWeave, establishing:

- Control repository structure with clear directory organization
- Testing infrastructure with 8 comprehensive tests for repo validation
- Bootstrap automation script for environment setup
- Metrics observer support and infrastructure templates
- GitHub workflow automation for config and infra deployments
- Agent instructions and copilot context documentation

Key features:
- tests/test_structure.py: 8 tests validating directory structure, required files, bootstrap script, workflow YAML, and stale reference removal
- scripts/bootstrap.sh: Automated setup script that exits 0 on clean checkout
- Complete specs documentation for control repo structure and related specifications
- Example templates and configuration for module development

All 8 tests pass. Bootstrap script validated. Workflow YAML valid.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: Add CI workflow to run structural tests and YAML lint on every PR

18 tests across 5 test classes that define the expected behaviour of
.github/workflows/ci.yaml before the file is created (TDD red phase).

Tests verify:
- File exists at .github/workflows/ci.yaml (not .yml)
- Triggers on pull_request (unscoped — every PR) and push to main
- Explicit permissions block with contents: read; no write/admin grants
- A step running `pytest tests/test_structure.py` with no continue-on-error
- A step running yamllint on .github/workflows/ with no continue-on-error
- yamllint targets .yaml extension (not only .yml)
- Each job runs on ubuntu-latest and has a checkout step

All 18 tests currently fail — they will pass once ci.yaml is implemented.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: Add CI workflow to run structural tests and YAML lint on every PR

Gates structural regressions on every pull_request and push to main by
running pytest tests/test_structure.py and yamllint on all workflow YAML.
Explicit permissions block restricts GITHUB_TOKEN to contents: read only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: Define copier.yaml metadata schema for template modules

TDD red phase: 58 tests across two new files that define the full
behavioral contract for schemas/copier-module.schema.json and the
CI gate that validates all modules/*/copier.yaml on every PR.

tests/test_copier_schema.py (56 tests):
- TestSchemaFileExists: schema lives at schemas/copier-module.schema.json,
  is valid JSON, declares Draft 7, passes jsonschema meta-validation
- TestRequiredFieldPresence: _metadata required; name/version/description
  are all mandatory; null and empty blocks rejected
- TestNamePatternValidation: snake_case pattern enforced; camelCase,
  PascalCase, kebab-case, leading underscore/digit, uppercase rejected
- TestVersionPatternValidation: CalVer YYYYMMDD.Patch enforced; semver,
  plain date, ISO date with hyphens, short-year format rejected
- TestOptionalMetadataFields: min_copier_version and parent accepted;
  unknown _metadata keys rejected (additionalProperties: false)
- TestVariableQuestionTypeValidation: str/bool/int/json/yaml accepted;
  float/list/dict/arbitrary strings rejected; missing type allowed
- TestExampleTemplateModuleIntegration: modules/example-template/copier.yaml
  exists, parses as YAML, and satisfies the schema
- TestAllModuleCopierYamlFilesAreSchemaValid: every modules/* directory
  has a schema-valid copier.yaml (regression guard for new modules)

tests/test_copier_schema_ci.py (7 tests):
- TestCIInstallsJsonschema: jsonschema added to pip install in ci.yaml
- TestCIRunsCopierSchemaTests: ci.yaml runs test_copier_schema.py (or
  full tests/) or a direct jsonschema validation step; step cannot have
  continue-on-error or branch gate
- TestCISchemaValidationReferencesSchemaFile: dedicated jsonschema step
  (if used) must reference schemas/copier-module.schema.json and modules/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: Define copier.yaml metadata schema for template modules

Add schemas/copier-module.schema.json (JSON Schema Draft 7) that enforces
the module metadata contract: snake_case name, CalVer YYYYMMDD.Patch version,
required description, optional min_copier_version and parent fields, and
validation of Copier question type values (str, bool, int, json, yaml).

Create modules/example-template/copier.yaml as the canonical reference
implementation satisfying the schema.

Wire jsonschema into CI: add it to the pip install step and add a dedicated
pytest step covering test_copier_schema.py and test_copier_schema_ci.py so
that every PR validates all modules/*/copier.yaml files against the schema.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Parso <david.g.parsonson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
perf: remove tool loop from check-ins, cut max_tokens across all calls

generateCheckIn now uses simple streaming (1 API call) instead of the
tool-call loop (up to 3 calls). Context block already carries enough
signal — commits, hot files, app tracker, week summary.

Also reduced max_tokens: respond 256→180, check-in 300→120,
weekly recap/progress 180→120. ~60-70% cost reduction per session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial release — long-term memory plugin for Claude Code

13 MCP tools (remember, recall, keyword_search, forget, add_entity,
add_relationship, get_entity, search_entities, graph_traverse, extract,
stats, export, projects) + 8 hooks for auto-injection and extraction.

Hybrid search: semantic (fastembed MiniLM, 384-dim) + keyword (FTS5 BM25)
+ graph traversal. LLM extraction via claude -p subprocess (zero config).
2 pip deps, ~253MB venv, cross-platform.
